data.title: OpenAI Enhances GPT-4o with Improved Instruction Handling and Creativity
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced a new update for GPT-4o, focusing on better adherence to complex instructions, particularly those involving multiple requests. The update also enhances the model's ability to tackle intricate technical and programming challenges, while boosting intuition and creativity. Additionally, the use of unnecessary emojis has been reduced. The updated version of GPT-4o is now available to paid users, with free users expected to receive access in the coming weeks.

data.title: White House drops Elise Stefanik’s UN Nomination to safeguard GOP majority
data.description:
The White House's decision to revoke Rep. Elise Stefanik's nomination as US ambassador to the UN has greatly impacted President Donald Trump's choice of Cabinet members.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/white-house-drops-stefaniks-un-nomination/

data.title: EU threatens domination over US big tech in response to tariffs
data.description:
The European Union is considering new measures to target US services exports, including steps that could hit Big Tech companies. The bloc’s decision comes after Washington slapped a 25 percent tariff on the car industry and hinted at further measures next week. One EU diplomat told FT, “The Americans think that they are the ones […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-threatens-domination-over-us-big-tech-in-response-to-tariffs/

data.title: Panama introduces legislation to legalize voluntary crypto payments, regulate industry
data.description:
Panama has unveiled a sweeping draft bill aimed at regulating cryptocurrencies and fostering the development of blockchain-based services, signaling a renewed effort to position the country as a fintech leader in Latin America.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/panama-introduces-legislation-to-legalize-voluntary-crypto-payments-regulate-industry/

data.title: US economy expands 2.4% in Q4 as corporate profits surge 5.9%
data.description:
The United States economy experienced significant growth of 2. 4% in the final quarter of 2024. This growth exceeded expectations and expert predictions.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-economy-expands-2-4-in-q4/

data.title: US DOJ says it seized Hamas crypto meant to finance terrorism
data.description:
The US Justice Department (DOJ) seized more than $200,000 in cryptocurrency intended to benefit the militant group Hamas it said in a statement on March 27. The cryptocurrency with a total value of $201,400 was traced to fundraising addresses allegedly controlled by Hamas and used to launder more than $1. 5 million in digital assets since October 2024. The laundering occurred through a series of “virtual currency exchanges and transactions by leveraging suspected financiers and over-the-counter brokers,” the DOJ said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-doj-seizes-201-k-of-hamas-terrorist-crypto-financing?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ZachXBT raises red flags about Token2049 sponsors
data.description:
Earlier today, ZachXBT shared updates about his latest observations via his Telegram group. This time, the spotlight was on Token2049, a prominent cryptocurrency event that is expected to attract major industry players in three separate events later this year. The alert warned members of the group to be wary of sponsors as the event approaches […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zachxbt-red-flags-token2049-sponsors/

data.title: SEC officially drops cases against Kraken, Consensys, and Cumberland
data.description:
The SEC has dismissed enforcement actions against Kraken, Consensys, and Cumberland, signaling a major shift in its crypto regulation strategy.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/sec-officially-drops-cases-against-kraken-consensys-and-cumberland

data.title: Sei Foundation Explores Buying 23andMe to Put Genetic Data on Blockchain
data.description:
The Sei Foundation is exploring the acquisition of 23andMe to integrate genetic data onto its blockchain, giving users ownership and control over their genetic data.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/sei-foundation-explores-buying-23andme-to-put-genetic-data-on-blockchain

data.title: Former SEC Chairman Paul Atkins' Crypto Involvement Sparks Industry Attention
data.description:
Paul Atkins' potential SEC chairmanship draws attention for his crypto holdings and leadership.
source: https://coincu.com/328984-paulatkins-sec-crypto-focus
